datapoints.description: DNS queries per second across all CoreDNS instances
datapoints.name: request_rate

datapoints.description: DNS request duration P99 in milliseconds
datapoints.name: request_duration_p99_ms

datapoints.name: nxdomain_rate

description: CoreDNS request rate, latency, error rates, and cache performance via Thanos Querier
technicalNotes: Single static instance. DNS request duration P99 converted to milliseconds. Cache hit ratio computed as hits/(hits+misses)*100. Forward errors track SERVFAIL responses from upstream resolvers.
name: OCP_CoreDNS_Health
